steps.label: Detect
steps.detail: Mail gateway flags an inbound message with a spoofed sender domain reported by 3 users.

steps.label: Triage
steps.detail: SOC analyst detonates the link in a sandbox and confirms a credential-harvesting page.

steps.label: Contain
steps.detail: Affected mailbox sessions/tokens revoked; the message is purged organization-wide.

steps.label: Eradicate
steps.detail: Sender domain blocked at the mail gateway and perimeter firewall.

steps.label: Recover
steps.detail: Password reset enforced for every user who clicked the link; MFA re-verified.

steps.label: Lessons Learned
steps.detail: Targeted phishing awareness training assigned to the affected department.

steps.label: Detect
steps.detail: EDR alerts on mass file-rename/encryption activity on a file server.

steps.label: Isolate
steps.detail: Affected hosts are pulled off the network before spread continues.

steps.label: Preserve Evidence
steps.detail: Memory and disk images captured prior to any shutdown or wipe.

steps.label: Identify
steps.detail: Malware analysis confirms variant and the initial access vector (exposed RDP).

steps.label: Recover
steps.detail: Clean restore from offline/immutable backups; affected credentials rotated.

steps.label: Post-Incident
steps.detail: RDP exposure patched, network segmented, detection rules updated.

steps.label: Detect
steps.detail: DLP alerts on an abnormal volume of records exported by a single account overnight.

steps.label: Triage
steps.detail: Access logs correlated against the employee's role — export volume exceeds job function.

steps.label: Contain
steps.detail: Account access suspended pending investigation; active sessions terminated.

steps.label: Investigate
steps.detail: HR + Legal engaged; forensic review of exported data scope and destination.

steps.label: Remediate
steps.detail: Access revoked/offboarded per findings; affected data owners notified.

steps.label: Lessons Learned
steps.detail: Least-privilege review triggered for the department's access model.
